panels.title: API 5xx (5m)
panels.description: API server responses with 5xx status codes in the last 5 minutes.

panels.title: API 429 (5m)
panels.description: HTTP 429 responses indicate API priority and fairness throttling or overload.

panels.title: APF Queued
panels.description: Current requests pending in API Priority and Fairness queues.

panels.title: DNS SERVFAIL (5m)
panels.description: CoreDNS SERVFAIL responses in the last 5 minutes.

panels.title: Unschedulable Pods
panels.description: Pods currently marked unschedulable.

panels.title: Failed Jobs
panels.description: Jobs with failed pods in the selected namespaces.

panels.title: Cordoned Nodes
panels.description: Nodes marked unschedulable.

panels.title: Node Pressure Conditions
panels.description: Nodes currently reporting MemoryPressure, DiskPressure, PIDPressure, or NetworkUnavailable.

panels.title: PV Not Bound
panels.description: PersistentVolumes not in the Bound phase.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (cluster, le, verb) (rate(apiserver_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster",subresource="",verb!="WATCH"}[5m]))) and on (cluster, verb) sum by (cluster, verb) (rate(apiserver_request_duration_seconds_count{cluster=~"$cluster",subresource="",verb!="WATCH"}[5m])) > 0

panels.title: API Request Latency p99 by Verb
panels.description: 99th percentile API request latency by verb. Long-running WATCH requests are excluded.

panels.title: API Inflight Requests by Kind
panels.description: Current API requests actively being handled, split by read-only and mutating requests.

panels.title: APF Queued Requests by Priority
panels.description: Current requests pending in API Priority and Fairness queues.

panels.title: APF Executing Requests by Priority
panels.description: Current requests executing under API Priority and Fairness.

panels.title: APF Rejected Requests
panels.description: API Priority and Fairness rejected requests. Nonzero values indicate overload or queue shedding.

panels.title: API Storage Errors
panels.description: Storage decode and data key generation errors. Nonzero values deserve investigation.

panels.title: etcd Request Latency p99 by Operation
panels.description: 99th percentile latency of API server requests to the etcd/kine backend, by operation. The backend is the usual root cause of control-plane slowness.

panels.title: etcd Request Rate by Operation
panels.description: Rate of API server requests to the etcd/kine backend, by operation.

panels.title: etcd Request Errors
panels.description: Errors returned by the etcd/kine backend. Nonzero values deserve investigation.

panels.title: Active Watch Requests
panels.description: Long-running (watch) requests currently held open against the API server. A steady climb can indicate a watch leak in a controller or client.

panels.title: etcd Object Count by Resource (Top 20)
panels.description: Number of objects stored in etcd/kine per resource type. Helps spot unexpected growth that bloats the backend.

panels.title: CoreDNS Panics (1h)
panels.description: CoreDNS process panics in the last hour.

panels.title: CoreDNS Forward Failures (5m)
panels.description: Upstream DNS forwarder healthcheck failures in the last 5 minutes.

panels.title: CoreDNS Reload Failures (1h)
panels.description: CoreDNS reload failures in the last hour.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (cluster, le, proxy_name, to) (rate(coredns_proxy_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))

panels.title: Unschedulable Pods by Namespace
panels.description: Pods currently marked unschedulable, grouped by namespace.

panels.title: Cordoned Nodes
panels.description: Nodes marked unschedulable.

targets.expr: sum by (cluster, namespace, pod, container, reason) (kube_pod_container_status_waiting_reason{cluster=~"$cluster",namespace=~"$namespace"} == 1)

panels.title: Container Waiting Reasons
panels.description: Containers currently waiting, grouped by reason.

panels.title: Failed Jobs
panels.description: Jobs with one or more failed pods.

panels.title: Scheduling Attempts by Result
panels.description: Rate of pod scheduling attempts by outcome. 'unschedulable' or 'error' indicate the scheduler cannot place pods.

panels.title: Pending Pods by Queue
panels.description: Pods waiting to be scheduled, split by scheduler queue (active, backoff, unschedulable, gated). A sustained backlog signals scheduling problems.

panels.title: Scheduling Attempt Latency p99
panels.description: 99th percentile end-to-end scheduling attempt duration.

panels.title: Workqueue Depth
panels.description: Total controller-manager workqueue depth. A sustained rise means controllers are falling behind on reconciliation.

panels.title: Workqueue Work Duration p99
panels.description: 99th percentile time controllers spend processing a single workqueue item.

panels.title: Workqueue Retries
panels.description: Rate of workqueue item retries. Elevated retries indicate controllers repeatedly failing to reconcile.

panels.title: CPU Requested vs Allocatable
panels.description: Total CPU requests as a percentage of cluster allocatable CPU.

panels.title: Memory Requested vs Allocatable
panels.description: Total memory requests as a percentage of cluster allocatable memory.

panels.title: Pods Used vs Allocatable
panels.description: Running pods as a percentage of cluster allocatable pod capacity.
